title_latin: Ad Quintum Fratrem 3.6 (= 3.5b in Shackleton Bailey)
title_english: Ad Quintum Fratrem 3.6 (combined with 3.5 in modern editions)
source_latin: Perseus Digital Library (canonical-latinLit) — material included under 3.5
stub_reason: Perseus TEI book 3 contains no separate letter 6 (sequence: 1,2,3,4,5,7,8,9). Modern editions combine the older 3.6 with the second half of 3.5 as a single letter, SB Q.fr. 3.5b. The aligned segments for this material are included in 054bc-ad-quintum-fratrem-03-05.json.
